apps.name: Solipuzzle
apps.subtitle: Daily Jigsaw Game
apps.shortDescription: A relaxing daily jigsaw puzzle game with 700+ levels, multiplayer races, and custom photo puzzles.

features.title: Daily Puzzle
features.description: A brand new puzzle every day. Build your streak!

features.title: 700+ Levels
features.description: 6 categories: Nature, City, Animals, Food, Travel, Art

features.title: Custom Photo Puzzles
features.description: Turn your own photos into puzzles

features.title: iCloud Sync
features.description: Progress syncs across all your devices

features.title: 11 Languages
features.description: EN, TR, ES, PT, FR, DE, RU, JA, KO, ZH, AR

faq.question: How do I play?
faq.answer: Drag puzzle pieces to swap them. Match all pieces to their correct positions to complete the puzzle.

faq.question: What is the Daily Puzzle?
faq.answer: Every day at midnight, a new puzzle is available. Complete it to build your streak!

faq.question: How does multiplayer work?
faq.answer: Create a room, share the 6-digit code with a friend, and race to solve the same puzzle first.

faq.question: How do I remove ads?
faq.answer: Go to Settings > Premium and purchase "Remove Ads" for a one-time fee.

faq.question: How do I sync my progress?
faq.answer: Your progress syncs automatically via iCloud. Make sure you're signed into iCloud on your device.

faq.question: Images are not loading?
faq.answer: Check your internet connection. If you're on mobile data in Turkey, the app has a fallback CDN for regions with network restrictions.

faq.question: How do I reset my progress?
faq.answer: Go to Settings > Danger Zone > Reset Progress. Warning: this cannot be undone.

faq.question: How do I use custom photos?
faq.answer: Go to "Your Photos" on the home screen, add photos from your library or camera, and play them as puzzles.
